nodes.label: BUILD_PLAYBOOK.md
nodes.summary: Scaffold + recursive build-and-validate loop seed; executed by Claude Code, not run from chat.

nodes.label: GATE_SPECIFICATION.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative §8.1 gate logic (v2.0-faithful) plus §R reconciliation of prior-build divergences.

nodes.label: System Requirements v2.0
nodes.summary: Immutable source of truth. Gate definitions §8.1; parameters §3–§9. Immutable during Phase A.

nodes.label: Master Blueprint v2.1
nodes.summary: Sequencing, replay/walk-forward, Part 15 playbook, pessimistic-fill SimulatedBroker.

nodes.label: Redesign v3.0
nodes.summary: Phase-A scope cut; A0–A11 sessions; moves Gate GA from week 7 to week 3 without moving the bar.

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md (governing)
nodes.summary: Governing instructions: spec immutability, query-graph-first, determinism is law, full §8.1 gate set, green tests before done.

nodes.label: ADR-001 broker bridge
nodes.summary: Inherited native-Windows MT5 bridge decision; carried into Phase A, used in Phase B.

nodes.label: ADR-002 go/no-go
nodes.summary: Records the GA verdict at A11.

nodes.label: Rule 1 — Spec Immutability
nodes.summary: v2.0 spec immutable in Phase A; implement §8.1 verbatim; deviations are parked written proposals in docs/decisions/.

nodes.label: Rule 2 — Physics / No Loosening
nodes.summary: Loop may apply divergence fixes and measure, but never loosen a threshold, alter the gate set, or change the universe → HALT-HUMAN.

nodes.label: Determinism Law
nodes.summary: Same candles + config → byte-identical decisions. No wall-clock, randomness, dict-order, or float-order in a decision path.

nodes.label: Phase A — Prove (wk 1–3)
nodes.summary: 5 modules, 4 tables, sessions A0–A11, Gate GA at end of week 3. No broker/state machine/Docker.

nodes.label: Phase B (wk 4–13)
nodes.summary: MT5 demo bridge, 5-state machine, live loop, 8-week frozen forward test, Track-2 hardening.

nodes.label: Phase C (wk 13+)
nodes.summary: VPS promotion, 10% review, trade-count-gated outcome learning.

nodes.label: C1 Data
nodes.summary: Data fetch/audit/load for all 4 instruments (A2–A3).

nodes.label: C2 Signal Engine
nodes.summary: The 8 §8.1 gates plus their conjunction (A4–A5).

nodes.label: C3 Backtest
nodes.summary: Event loop, position lifecycle, SimulatedBroker pessimistic fills (A6–A7).

nodes.label: C4 Walk-Forward
nodes.summary: 18m train / 6m test, roll 3m, all 4 instruments; wf_run + sim_trade keyed to config_hash (A9).

nodes.label: C5 Verdict
nodes.summary: OOS metrics, equity/DD, per-window stability; verdict vs spec §13 thresholds read from config (A10).

nodes.label: SimulatedBroker
nodes.summary: Pessimistic-fill broker (v2.1 Part 7.1); backtest talks only to it in Phase A; no fill kinder than the model.

nodes.label: config_version table
nodes.summary: Stores config versions / config_hash; part of 001_core.sql 4-table schema.

nodes.label: candle table
nodes.summary: Price candle storage.

nodes.label: signal table
nodes.summary: Per-candle signal rows from the gate conjunction.

nodes.label: wf_run + sim_trade tables
nodes.summary: Walk-forward run + simulated trade rows keyed to config_hash.

nodes.label: 001_core.sql
nodes.summary: 4-table Phase-A schema migration applied to lsb_dev Postgres.

nodes.label: config_hash
nodes.summary: sha256 of frozen-dataclass config (YAML→frozen dataclass); identical configs → identical hashes; keys wf_run/sim_trade.

nodes.label: Gate 1 — Trend State
nodes.summary: M3 trend BEARISH: EMA21<EMA50<EMA89 + negative slopes. NEUTRAL/INVALID block. Macro timeframe Daily (D1) per §3.2.

nodes.label: Gate 2 — Structure
nodes.summary: ASCENDING_TRIANGLE on H4 with all §6.1.1 params incl. Invalidation on close >0.30% above resistance.

nodes.label: Gate 3 — Liquidity Sweep
nodes.summary: Wick above resistance block HIGH by ≥2pip/0.02%, close below block high, within last 3 H1 candles, false-sweep filter.

nodes.label: Gate 4 — EMA Interaction
nodes.summary: Sweep/confirmation candle high within 3pip/0.03% of EMA21 or EMA50. Hard gate; prior build dropped it.

nodes.label: Gate 5 — Rejection Candle
nodes.summary: REJECTION_BEAR or ENGULFING_BEAR; closes below sweep high; upper wick ≥2× body (§4.3/§8.1).

nodes.label: Gate 6 — Session Active
nodes.summary: Session VALID per §3.3 UTC bands; Crypto 24/7; Asia JPY-only; 30-min open/close buffer; 60-min news buffer.

nodes.label: Gate 7 — Risk:Reward Minimum
nodes.summary: Structural stop §9.1; target hierarchy §9.4 (2.5R floor / liquidity pool / ATR×3). PASS iff R:R ≥ 2.5.

nodes.label: Gate 8 — Global Risk Clear
nodes.summary: M11 TRADING_ALLOWED; DD/consecutive-loss limits; Phase-A stub-pass; ATR EXTREME pre-filter active.

nodes.label: Sweep Probability Score (not a gate)
nodes.summary: 5-factor 0–100 score sets risk tier (§7.3→§9.3), does NOT qualify the trade. Prior build wrongly promoted ≥50 to gate 4.

nodes.label: §8.1 Gate Conjunction
nodes.summary: All eight §8.1 conditions TRUE on the same H1 bar; a single FALSE disqualifies. Bearish setup; bullish is the mirror.

nodes.label: Invalidation Rule (§6.1.1/.2)
nodes.summary: Pattern → INVALIDATED → NONE on close beyond resistance/support; must be reachable. Prior build omitted it.

nodes.label: Block HIGH (sweep target)
nodes.summary: Sweep targets the block HIGH (highest swing-high wick), not a mean level. ADR-006 diverged.

nodes.label: Flat Tolerance 0.15%
nodes.summary: Spec baseline for resistance flatness (§6.1.1), configurable; validation baseline 0.15%. Prior build ran 0.5–2.0%.

nodes.label: EURUSD
nodes.summary: FX major, pip 0.0001, FX sessions, Dukascopy source.

nodes.label: GBPUSD
nodes.summary: FX major (natively supported §3.1); correlates with EURUSD, adds little independent evidence.

nodes.label: XAUUSD
nodes.summary: Gold; not enumerated in §3.1 classes; treated as configured commodity (choice recorded).

nodes.label: BTCUSD
nodes.summary: Crypto, pip 0.01, 24/7 sessions, Binance source.

nodes.label: Dukascopy
nodes.summary: 3y history source for EUR/GBP/XAU.

nodes.label: Binance
nodes.summary: 3y history source for BTC.

nodes.label: Gate GA
nodes.summary: End-of-week-3 GO/NO-GO: OOS expectancy positive, profit factor/DD per §13, sample ≥ §13 min, ±20% perturbation doesn't flip.

nodes.label: GO
nodes.summary: qualified ≥ §13 minimum and OOS thresholds met.

nodes.label: NO-GO / INSUFFICIENT
nodes.summary: A valid result; the spec as written may yield too few qualified signals.

nodes.label: HALT-HUMAN
nodes.summary: Owner gate; written when a loosening is required or GA short of §13 bar.

nodes.label: R-DECIDE (owner gate)
nodes.summary: Human-only menu when GA short: RESOLVE_SPEC_DEFECT, EXPAND_UNIVERSE, PREREGISTER_PROPOSAL, REDESIGN, ACCEPT_INSUFFICIENT.

nodes.label: Recursive Build-and-Validate Loop
nodes.summary: Phase-A A0–A11: read RECURSION_STATE → execute step → write evidence → advance/halt/terminate. Build module, then guard, then verify.

nodes.label: RECURSION_STATE.md
nodes.summary: Step pointer + human-write-only fields (fair_universe, human_decision, approved proposals).

nodes.label: graphify knowledge base
nodes.summary: Doc/code knowledge graph; query/affected before reading source; --postgres seeding in Phase B; MCP endpoint for Claude Code.

nodes.label: Spec Defect: §4.3 vs §8.1 rejection geometry
nodes.summary: Bull rejection wick direction conflict; long-side Gate 5 unsatisfiable until reconciled by owner amendment.

nodes.label: Spec Ambiguity: D1 vs H1 trend timeframe
nodes.summary: §3.2 macro=Daily vs §4.1 EMAs on H1; resolved to Daily pending owner; highest-leverage strategy question.
nodes.norm_label: spec ambiguity: d1 vs h1 trend timeframe

nodes.label: §R Reconciliation
nodes.summary: Table of prior-build divergences vs immutable spec; the new C2 implements the spec, not the divergences.

nodes.label: Prior-Build Drift
nodes.summary: Loosenings (flat tol 0.5–2%, mean sweep target, missing EMA gate, FX sessions on BTC, sweep-score-as-gate) drifting toward manufacturing trades.

nodes.label: .claude/settings.local.json
nodes.summary: Claude Code local permissions for this project; currently allow-lists PowerShell(graphify export *) so graph exports run without a prompt.

nodes.label: GA-1 Determinism Gate (A8 CI)
nodes.summary: Phase-A A8 CI gate: replay the run twice and assert byte-identical config_hash; injected nondeterminism is caught. Enforces the Determinism Law.

nodes.label: Spec Defect: §17.1 minimum trade count undefined
nodes.summary: §17.1 defines no minimum trade count; the INSUFFICIENT boundary needs an owner number (or stated convention, e.g. >=30 OOS trades/instrument) pinned in spec config before A11. Flagged as the one genuine gap.
nodes.norm_label: spec defect: §17.1 minimum trade count undefined

nodes.label: §17.1 GA Threshold Bar
nodes.summary: Gate-GA numeric bar, read from spec config and never re-typed: expectancy >0.3R, max DD <15%, win >40% at 2.5R, Sharpe >1.0, coverage >=3y and >=3 instruments. Blueprint '§13' is a mis-citation of §17.1.

nodes.label: ATR EXTREME → No-Trade Pre-filter (§4.2.2/§9.3)
nodes.summary: ATR EXTREME forces risk tier 0% / no trade regardless of gates or sweep score; an active pre-filter on Global-Risk clearance.

nodes.label: Risk Tier (§9.3 position sizing)
nodes.summary: Position-sizing tier (1.0/0.5/0.25%/skip) set by the sweep-probability score (§7.3->§9.3); ATR EXTREME or drawdown breach zeroes it. Not a qualification gate.

nodes.label: Implementation Plan — A1: Config System + Core Schema
nodes.norm_label: implementation plan — a1: config system + core schema

nodes.label: ADR-004 — Bull rejection geometry: lower-wick hammer
nodes.norm_label: adr-004 — bull rejection geometry: lower-wick hammer
